The '''Escape from Rattatak''' was the escape of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha-17]] from [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress's]] [[Castle Ventress|citadel]] of [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. Ventress [[Torture/Legends|tormented]] Obi-Wan with [[muscle maggot]]s and a [[Sith torture mask]]. She did this to prove him unworthy of being a potential apprentice to [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].

Obi-Wan and Alpha escaped from their cells and killed Asajj's guards and tried to escape on the landing pad. Asajj intercepted them, but couldn't prevent them from escaping. They were pursued by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] fighters, but were destroyed by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] trying to get [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] bounties. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] rescued them and returned them to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
